title: File articles of reincorporation
description: Re-state a company under the current Companies Act of Barbados.
summary: Articles of reincorporation are filed under Section 355.5 of the Companies Act to bring a company under the current Act.
You will need this if your company was set up under an older law and needs to be brought up to date.

items: the current name and company number
the maximum number of shares the company can issue
any restrictions on issuing or transferring shares
the minimum and maximum number of directors
any restrictions on the business the company can do

items.name: Resolution of directors approving the reincorporation
Notice of registered office and directors
Photo ID for the signing officer
Proof of payment of the filing fee

fees: Filing fees are set by CAIPO. Confirm before you submit.
how_long: A decision usually takes 4 to 6 weeks.

options.heading: Through an attorney-at-law
content: A Barbadian attorney-at-law will file the articles with CAIPO.

contact.agency: Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office (CAIPO)
contact.address:
Baobab Tower, Ground Floor
Warrens
St. Michael
